summary: Set 10 Session 3 (final session): Shipped Dabbler: Install ai-router and Dabbler: Update ai-router commands plus a graceful 'not configured' tree-item refactor in the Provider Queues / Heartbeats views, and authored the set's change-log.md. Pre-session check confirmed PyPI v0.1.0 is live (HTTP 200). New code: src/utils/aiRouterInstall.ts (pure-logic install core with DI'd ProcessSpawner / FileOps / InstallPrompts; PyPI path materializes ai_router/router-config.yaml from importlib.resources on a fresh install; GitHub path resolves latest release tag via git ls-remote, copies sparse checkout to the persistent .dabbler/ai-router-src/ for editable install, wipes stale workspace ai_router/ before copying, stash-and-restore protocol with retry/finalize wrapper that downgrades success to failure if config restore fails; ENOENT-only bootstrap fallback for venv creation; configurable repoUrl for fork support); src/commands/installAiRouterCommands.ts (VS Code wiring with QuickPick / withProgress / mkdirp-on-write fs adapter / Configuration.inspect-based settings fallback). Provider refactor: ProviderQueuesProvider + ProviderHeartbeatsProvider detect ModuleNotFoundError in parseFetchResult, store a _lastErrorReason, clear cache on any failure (so previously-successful fetches don't mask the new state), render notInstalled root + notInstalledAction child whose command fires dabblerSessionSets.installAiRouter directly (neutral info icons, distinct contextValues from the existing red-error path). Wiring: extension.ts registers the new commands; package.json bumped 0.11.0 -> 0.12.0 with new commands + dabblerSessionSets.pythonPath + dabblerSessionSets.aiRouterRepoUrl settings. Tests: src/test/suite/installAiRouter.test.ts with 47 standalone-mocha tests covering both install paths (8 PyPI + 8 GitHub), the detector (5), deriveVenvFromPythonPath (4), resolveLatestReleaseTag (3), early aborts (1), install-method marker round-trip (1), parseFetchResult for both providers (4), tree-item rendering for both providers (5), failure-invalidates-cache for both (3), and the venv-bootstrap edge cases (2). All 47 pass. Full unit suite: 140 passing, 3 failing (the 3 failures pre-exist on master and are unrelated to this session - confirmed by stashing the changes and re-running). Docs: README.md adoption section restructured to lead with the extension command (5-step flow + CLI fallback + editable/source-install fallback); tools/dabbler-ai-orchestration/README.md gained a new Install ai-router feature block + updated Requirements section (forward-references converted to v0.12 statements). VSIX: dabbler-ai-orchestration-0.12.0.vsix (329 KB, 18 files). Python tests: 676 passed in 52.89s (matches Sessions 1/2 baseline; no Python source touched this session). Verification: SEVEN rounds via gpt-5-4 (cost $1.7822 cumulative this session - far over the workflow's max-2-retries budget; each round caught real issues including a regression I introduced in round 6 that round 7 corrected). Round 7 returned VERIFIED with two Info-severity follow-ups documented in change-log.md Residual notes (install-method marker I/O not outcome-wrapped; GitHub re-installs intentionally wipe workspace ai_router/ preserving only router-config.yaml). Set close-out: change-log.md authored summarizing all 3 sessions; cumulative routed cost across the set $2.3970 vs spec projection $0.35-$0.70 (3.5x over - driven entirely by Session 3's seven-round iteration on a TS/Python/UX-coupled feature surface).
